name: multi-analyst-desk
description: A multi-analyst AI team for ETF options trading. Four specialists (macro, sector, quant, event) plus a chief strategist produce pre-market, intraday, and post-market reports with actionable credit spread recommendations. Features: disagreement-driven synthesis instead of consensus averaging, multi-scenario equilibrium pricing, bilingual news intelligence (English + Chinese sources), built-in critical thinking (Devil's Advocate, contradiction detection), and VIX-adjusted Kelly position sizing. Works fully standalone via WebSearch — no external data pipeline required.

YOUR_CAPITAL.description: Your total trading capital in USD, used for Kelly position sizing calculations

LANGUAGE.description: Output language preference. Default is English; Traditional Chinese is also supported.

examples.title: Full pre-market analysis
examples.prompt: Run the full pre-market analysis across SPY, QQQ, IWM, XLE, XLF, GLD, TLT, and SMH. I want the 4-analyst team breakdown plus top 3 credit spread recommendations with Kelly sizing.
examples.description: 4-analyst team produces multi-scenario mispricing table, hypothesis probability updates, and credit spread recommendations with Kelly sizing

examples.title: Intraday spike scan
examples.prompt: The VIX just spiked 15% and XLE is down 3%. Run an intraday scan — is this a tradeable signal or noise? If signal, give me a specific credit spread recommendation.
examples.description: Opportunity-detector runs noise vs signal classification, then trade-analyst provides actionable recommendation if warranted

examples.title: Daily workflow setup
examples.prompt: Set up my daily trading workflow: schedule a pre-market analysis at 8:30 AM ET, hourly intraday checks during market hours, and a post-market review at 4:30 PM ET.
examples.description: Configures all three scheduled tasks for automated daily ETF options workflow
